body:
This PR adds moisture to `single_column_radiative_equilibrium.jl`. Specifically, it adds an `idealized_h2o` flag to the `rrtmgp_model_cache`, which computes a volume mixing ratio at every point such that the relative humidity is at most 0.6 and the specific humidity decreases monotonically with height. Due to our unrealistic initial condition (300 K throughout the domain), the relative humidity is slowly increased from 0 to 0.6 to prevent RRTMGP from giving absurd values at the top of the domain at the start of the simulation.

Also, this PR adds grid stretching to the radiative equilibrium example (so that `dz = 100` at the bottom and `dz = 10000` at the top), and it makes grid stretching available for other examples that use `driver.jl`.

In addition, this PR allows non-idealized insolation to work for flat spaces, and it fixes a bug in non-idealized insolation that occurs when `FT = Float32`, though the radiative equilibrium example will continue to use idealized insolation by default.

Closes #349
title: Add moist radiative equilibrium example

body: Currently, the jld2 data is saved in the format of `dayX.jld2` which contains which day the data is. However, I found it useful to add seconds of the day into the filename when debugging. Usually, I save the data step-by-step on the day the simulation crashes and it overwrites if the filename contains only day info.
title: update jld2 filename

body:
This PR
 - adds compat entries for some of our dependencies-- right now we're auto-updating to breaking versions. This should help us more easily manage upgrading deps. 
 - Fixes cli flags for the long runs.

I used `CompatDevTools` to kick start the compat entries in `examples/`, and then applied `synchronize_compats` to the package directory.
title: Add/manage compat entries

body: This PR fixes some docs formatting and improves some of the logs
title: Improve docs and logging

body:
This PR closes out #326 by:
 - Upgrading to the latest NCRegressionTests, which is now more strict
 - Use the oldest reference dataset with a matching reference counter

I just recently cleared the julia depot path, so this should actually upgrade to the latest versions.
title: Update the regression test logic

body: Update mass tendencies to reflect diffusive moisture tendencies.
title: Hyperdiffusion (moisture) contribution to mass equation
